errors: https: <urlopen error Tunnel connection failed: 403 Forbidden>

tls.error: [Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known

findings.title: Service served over plaintext HTTP only
findings.description: Traffic (including credentials/session tokens) is transmitted unencrypted.
findings.evidence: http reachable, https failed: [Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known
findings.remediation: Terminate TLS (ACM on the ALB) and redirect HTTP->HTTPS.

findings.title: Dangerous HTTP methods enabled: TRACE, DELETE, PUT
findings.description: Write/diagnostic verbs are enabled; PUT/DELETE may allow content tampering, TRACE can enable Cross-Site Tracing.
findings.remediation: Disable unused methods at the application/proxy layer.

findings.title: HSTS not set
findings.description: Without HSTS, clients can be downgraded to HTTP and are vulnerable to SSL-stripping man-in-the-middle attacks.

findings.title: Content-Security-Policy not set
findings.description: No CSP increases the blast radius of any XSS on the asset.
findings.remediation: Define a restrictive CSP appropriate to the app.

findings.title: X-Content-Type-Options not set
findings.description: MIME sniffing can turn benign uploads into script execution.

findings.title: Clickjacking protection missing
findings.description: Neither X-Frame-Options nor a CSP frame-ancestors directive is present.

findings.title: No WAF/CDN detected in front of public web asset
findings.description: No edge protection signature was observed; the origin may be directly exposed to L7 attacks and volumetric traffic.
findings.remediation: Front the asset with AWS WAF + CloudFront or equivalent.

review.summary: 7 issue(s) found on shop.example.com (dns_record, owner: unknown). Highest severity: HIGH — Service served over plaintext HTTP only.
key_findings: [HIGH/MEDIUM conf] Service served over plaintext HTTP only
[HIGH/MEDIUM conf] Dangerous HTTP methods enabled: TRACE, DELETE, PUT
[LOW/LOW conf] No WAF/CDN detected in front of public web asset
review.potential_impact: Traffic (including credentials/session tokens) is transmitted unencrypted.
recommended_actions: Terminate TLS (ACM on the ALB) and redirect HTTP->HTTPS.
Disable unused methods at the application/proxy layer.
Define a restrictive CSP appropriate to the app.
Front the asset with AWS WAF + CloudFront or equivalent.
